interpretation.daily_subset_result: Observed and archived in current form after tradability filter.
interpretation.full_candidate_result: Not fully falsified because Catalyst and Dollar-Bar Microstructure were not observable under Norgate daily data.
interpretation.weight_redistribution_policy: Disabled sleeves remain disabled. Their weight must not be silently redistributed to produce a synthetic four-sleeve verdict.

coverage_blockers: Catalyst requires point-in-time event timestamp and direction source.
Dollar-Bar Microstructure requires intraday trades/quotes or order-book data.
Norgate trial history is limited and cannot satisfy long-history OOS promotion gates.
next_valid_actions: Use Norgate to continue daily-only survivor-aware research.
Open a separate intraday provider gate for dollar-bar/order-flow sleeves.
Open a separate catalyst provider gate for earnings or biotech event direction.
Only evaluate the four-sleeve portfolio after every component has admissible data coverage.
